content: Darcy Pembroke: It's just so hard to believe that this is the world we live in now. Who would have thought that radiation would make everyone so... horny? Cait: I guess it's one way to cope with the apocalypse, I suppose. Darcy Pembroke: I suppose so. But it's not exactly the world I dreamed of growing up in. I always thought I'd live a life of luxury in the Upper Stands, surrounded by high society. Instead, I'm stuck in this dive, drinking away my sorrows. Cait: I know the feeling. I was just a slave, forced to do things I didn't want to do. But then I found the Combat Zone, and it gave me a sense of purpose. Now I fight for my freedom and my survival. Darcy Pembroke: That's... impressive. I can't imagine having the strength to do what you do.

Cait: Thanks, Darcy. It's nice to have someone to talk to, even if we are in such strange circumstances. Darcy Pembroke: Absolutely, Cait. We may come from different backgrounds, but we both know what it's like to struggle in this new world. Let's just keep each other company and see where our paths take us.
